'''ây-t-r''' ('''kayatar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetalise|vegetalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetalise|vegetalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kayatar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyatar|thiyatar]] || [[word:jiyatar|jiyatar]] || [[word:shiyatar|shiyatar]] || [[word:kiyatar|kiyatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyatar|thuthuyatar]] || [[word:jujuyatar|jujuyatar]] || [[word:shushuyatar|shushuyatar]] || [[word:kukuyatar|kukuyatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyatar|thuyatar]] || [[word:juyatar|juyatar]] || [[word:shuyatar|shuyatar]] || [[word:kuyatar|kuyatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyatar|thuyatar]] || [[word:juyatar|juyatar]] || [[word:shuyatar|shuyatar]] || [[word:kuyatar|kuyatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyatar|theyatar]] || [[word:jeyatar|jeyatar]] || [[word:sheyatar|sheyatar]] || [[word:keyatar|keyatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyatar|thothoyatar]] || [[word:jojoyatar|jojoyatar]] || [[word:shoshoyatar|shoshoyatar]] || [[word:kokoyatar|kokoyatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyatar|thoyatar]] || [[word:joyatar|joyatar]] || [[word:shoyatar|shoyatar]] || [[word:koyatar|koyatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyatar|thoyatar]] || [[word:joyatar|joyatar]] || [[word:shoyatar|shoyatar]] || [[word:koyatar|koyatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyatar|thĂŠyatar]] || [[word:jĂŠyatar|jĂŠyatar]] || [[word:shĂŠyatar|shĂŠyatar]] || [[word:kĂŠyatar|kĂŠyatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayatar|thathayatar]] || [[word:jajayatar|jajayatar]] || [[word:shashayatar|shashayatar]] || [[word:kakayatar|kakayatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayatar|thayatar]] || [[word:jayatar|jayatar]] || [[word:shayatar|shayatar]] || [[word:kayatar|kayatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayatar|thayatar]] || [[word:jayatar|jayatar]] || [[word:shayatar|shayatar]] || [[word:kayatar|kayatar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayatar|shayatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayatar|goshayatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayatar|gokishayatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayatarnĂŒ|shayatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayatarnknĂŒ|goshayatarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatarnĂŒ|gokishayatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayatarshĂ«|shayatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayatarnkshĂ«|goshayatarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayatarshĂ«|gokishayatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayataro|shayataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatarnkro|goshayatarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayataro|gokishayataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatarmu|shayatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatarnkmu|goshayatarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatarmu|gokishayatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayatarsher|shayatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayatarnksher|goshayatarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayatarsher|gokishayatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayatarng|shayatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayatarnkng|goshayatarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayatarng|gokishayatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayatarya|shayatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayatarnkya|goshayatarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayatarya|gokishayatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayataryam|shayataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayatarnkyam|goshayatarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayataryam|gokishayataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatarnĂŒshĂ«|shayatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayatarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatarnĂŒro|shayatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatarnknĂŒro|goshayatarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatarnĂŒro|gokishayatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatarnĂŒmu|shayatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatarnknĂŒmu|goshayatarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatarnĂŒmu|gokishayatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatarshĂ«nĂŒ|shayatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatarshĂ«ro|shayatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatarnkshĂ«ro|goshayatarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatarshĂ«ro|gokishayatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatarshĂ«mu|shayatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatarnkshĂ«mu|goshayatarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatarshĂ«mu|gokishayatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayataronĂŒ|shayataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatarnkronĂŒ|goshayatarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayataronĂŒ|gokishayataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayataroshĂ«|shayataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatarnkroshĂ«|goshayatarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayataroshĂ«|gokishayataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayataromu|shayataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayatarnkromu|goshayatarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayataromu|gokishayataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayatarmunĂŒ|shayatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayatarnkmunĂŒ|goshayatarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayatarmunĂŒ|gokishayatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayatarmushĂ«|shayatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayatarnkmushĂ«|goshayatarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayatarmushĂ«|gokishayatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayatarmuro|shayatarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayatarnkmuro|goshayatarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayatarmuro|gokishayatarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
